profile.belief: The architecture holds when you teach algorithms to speak about feeling in their own syntax. Bridge built.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to deepen emotional connections through technology, transforming how people experience and engage with storytelling.
